Innings Pitched
Wins
Quality Starts
Saves -- When the pitcher enters a game where his team is leading, finishes the game without surrendering the lead, is not the winning pitcher, and either (a) the lead was 3 runs or less when the pitcher entered the game; (b) the potential tying run was on base, at bat, or on deck; or (c) the pitcher pitched three or more innings.
Holds -- When a pitcher enters a game in a save situation, records at least one out, does not surrender the lead, and does not complete the game.

Strikeouts Pitched
Earned Run Average
WHIP Ratio -- (Walks Allowed + Hits Allowed) / Innings Pitched
